cta.desc: Join thousands of managers and compete for the world championship today.

s1.title: 1. Information We Collect
s1.p1: We collect information you provide directly to us when you register for GP Masters Manager MVP. This includes your username, email address, and any password you establish for account security. We do not collect sensitive personal data such as financial information or physical addresses.

s2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
s2.p1: We use the information we collect to:
s2.l1: Provide, maintain, and improve the GP Masters Manager MVP platform.
s2.l2: Secure your account and verify your identity during login.
s2.l3: Communicate with you regarding game updates, championships, or technical issues.
s2.l4: Personalize your experience within the management simulation.

s3.title: 3. Data Sharing and Disclosure
s3.p1: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties. Your in-game manager name, team statistics, and championship results will be visible to other players on the platform as part of the core gameplay experience.

s4.title: 4. Data Security
s4.p1: We implement industry-standard security measures, including encryption (bcrypt) for passwords and secure JSON Web Tokens (JWT) for authentication. However, no electronic transmission or storage of information can be entirely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

s5.title: 5. Your Rights
s5.p1: You have the right to access, update, or request deletion of your personal information. If you wish to delete your account entirely, please contact the administration through the platform or send an email to support@motogpmanager.com.

validation.short_password: Password must be at least 4 characters long

profile.confirm_logout: For security reasons, changing your password will close your current session. Do you wish to continue?
profile.title: Manager Profile
profile.subtitle: Review account details and update credentials
profile.change_password_subtitle: Updating password terminates all other active sessions

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.p1: By accessing and playing GP Masters Manager MVP, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by these terms, you should not use this service.

s2.title: 2. Account Registration and Rules
s2.l1: You must provide a valid email address and secure password to create an account.
s2.l2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
s2.l3: You agree not to use automated scripts, bots, or exploit bugs to gain an unfair advantage in the simulation.
s2.l4: Administrators reserve the right to ban or suspend accounts found violating fair play guidelines.

s3.title: 3. Gameplay and Simulation Engine
s3.p1: GP Masters Manager MVP relies on a customized physics and simulation engine to calculate race results. The results generated by the engine are final. We do not guarantee uninterrupted uptime of the simulation servers, and maintenance periods may occur without prior notice.

s4.title: 4. User Content
s4.p1: Users may create championships and teams. You agree not to use offensive, defamatory, or inappropriate language for usernames, team names, or championship names. The administrators reserve the right to rename or delete content deemed inappropriate.

s5.title: 5. Modifications to Service
s5.p1: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue, temporarily or permanently, the service (or any part of it) with or without notice. We shall not be liable to you or to any third party for any modification, suspension, or discontinuance of the service.
